prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM Ecotec LNF 2.0L Turbo (engine code: LNF)** from the Chevrolet HHR SS, retaining the FWD layout but upgrading to a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe** and **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** for precise boost control at 28 psi (stock LNF runs ~20 psi). The stock LNF internals are reinforced with **Manley forged pistons (8.2:1 compression)** and **Crower forged connecting rods**, paired with a **Darton MID sleeves** for increased cylinder strength. Fueling is handled by **Bosch Motorsport 1000cc injectors** and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**, controlled by a **Hondata KPro4 standalone ECU** with a **custom flex-fuel ethanol sensor** for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul using **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Vectra C-specific valving)** with **polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1023K)** for the front control arms and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, part #BMR75X)** to reduce body roll. The braking system is upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors, part #09.9455.11)** and **2-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors, part #08.9215.10)**, paired with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.

Drivetrain upgrades include a **Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QDF7J)** for the stock F17+ transmission, mated to a **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch (organic/ceramic hybrid disc)** and **Fidanza lightweight flywheel (11.8 lbs, part #161261)**. The exhaust system is a **custom 3-inch stainless steel setup by Milltek Sport**, featuring a **resonated center section** and **titanium-coated 4-inch dual exits**, with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for fine-tuning turbo response.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Vectra C-specific, part #RB-VC-GTX)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser**, both reinforced with **aluminum honeycomb core** for rigidity. The kit includes **extended fender flares (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear)** and **custom side skirts** to accommodate the Öhlins coilovers and Brembo brakes. Paint is a **custom matte Porsche GT3 RS Lime Gold (911 code: 298)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl overlays** on the roof, mirrors, and diffuser.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a **Sparco Pro ADV racing seat (part #01866NR)** in **Alcantara/leather (black with lime green stitching)**, paired with a **Schroth Profi II 6-point harness (part #41400.95)**. The dashboard is replaced with a **Momo Mod.70 carbon fiber steering wheel (350mm, part #00712000)** and a **Motec C127 digital dash** displaying boost, AFR, and oil temps. The rear seats are removed and replaced with a **custom aluminum roll cage (by Safety Devices, part #SD0200)** for chassis rigidity, finished in **powder-coated lime green**.

Aerodynamic enhancements include a **custom carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts** (for LNF intercooler cooling) and a **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, part #VOL-03-1200)** mounted on **aluminum pedestals** for adjustable angle. The wheels are **Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/18 front, 285/30/18 rear)**. Additional details include **custom LED taillights (by LUX Automotive, part #LUX-VC-GTX)** and **carbon fiber side markers** with integrated turn signals.
